blocks.content:
In this milestone, you open Grafana Cloud Connections and explore **Collector Setup**, where you install Grafana Alloy and choose how it runs.

Collector Setup is the Cloud UI entry point for deploying Alloy. From here, integrations and send-data workflows reuse Alloy to collect telemetry and forward it to your stack.

Select the **Alloy** collector type.

The **Alloy** option is the default path most beginners use. It installs the Alloy collector and uses Alloy configuration syntax for your pipelines.

Review the **OpenTelemetry** collector type.

The **OpenTelemetry** option is for teams that want standard OpenTelemetry Collector-style configuration. For this introduction, stay with **Alloy**.
You found Alloy install options in Collector Setup and compared the Alloy and OpenTelemetry collector types.
In the next milestone, you look at Fleet Management, which helps you operate many Alloy collectors from Grafana Cloud.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your path, you can explore the following topics:

- [Connect or send data to Grafana Cloud](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/get-started/connect-send/)
- [Set up Grafana Alloy](https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/set-up/)
- [OpenTelemetry in Alloy](https://grafana.com/docs/alloy/latest/introduction/otel_alloy/)
